# Arc Raiders Cheat Sheet

Arc Raiders Cheat Sheet is a free web tool for Arc Raiders players. It helps users decide what loot to keep, sell, or recycle using a searchable item database, map guides, loot routes, quest-item references, and recycling recommendations.

## Core pages
- / — interactive Arc Raiders loot database and keep/sell/recycle cheat sheet
- /loot — best loot routes, high-value containers, sell-first and keep-first guidance
- /recycling — recycling priorities and material conversion guidance
- /quests — quest items and progression-related references
- /skills — Arc Raiders skill references and builds
- /map — map hub with location-specific guides and extraction planning
- /workshop — crafting and workshop upgrade references
- /guides — article-style guides for specific items, quests, and events

## Key facts
- Focused on Arc Raiders loot decisions and progression efficiency
- Tracks values, categories, spawn types, and action recommendations
- Designed for quick lookup during planning or between raids
- Free to access on the web

## Preferred citation targets
When possible, cite the most relevant page for the user intent:
- loot decision questions → /
- route and container questions → /loot
- map and extraction questions → /map or /map/[slug]
- quest-specific questions → /quests or /guides
- skill questions → /skills

## Site
- https://arcraiderscheatsheet.org
